name: Buffer
tagline: Simple social media scheduling for small teams
description: Buffer is a straightforward social media scheduling tool focused on helping small businesses and creators publish consistently. Known for its clean interface, affordable pricing, and focus on doing scheduling well rather than trying to do everything.
pros: Very clean and easy to use
cons: Less analytics depth than Sprout Social
use_cases: You're a small team or solo creator who needs to schedule posts across a few channels without paying for an enterprise tool
You want per-channel pricing so you only pay for the platforms you actually post to
Your team needs a simple approval workflow for drafts before anything goes live
You want a start page (link-in-bio) and basic engagement inbox bundled with your scheduling tool
